name: FileUploaderDragndropDirective
description: Directive that handles the drag and drop feature of the file input.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether selecting of new files is disabled.

inputs.name: dragndrop
inputs.description: Whether drag and drop is enabled. Disables this directive.

inputs.name: maxFileSize
inputs.description: Max file size in bytes that the input will accept.

inputs.name: minFileSize
inputs.description: Min file size in bytes that the input will accept.

inputs.name: multiple
inputs.description: Whether multiple files can be dropped at once.

outputs.name: dragEntered
outputs.description: Event emitted when the dragged file enters the dropzone.

outputs.name: dragLeave
outputs.description: Event emitted when the dragged file exits the dropzone.

outputs.name: fileChanged
outputs.description: Event emitted when files are dropped. Passes back an array of files.
